scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend,mobile "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.deploy:prepare: npm run db:generate --prefix backend && npm run prisma:deploy --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
